lines: Population. India has overtaken China with 1.44 billion. China has 1.41 billion.
GDP. China dominates at 18.5 trillion dollars. India has 3.7 trillion.
Land Area. China is larger at 9.6 million square kilometers. India has 3.3 million.
Military Personnel. India has 1.5 million active. China has 2 million.
Nuclear Warheads. China has 500 warheads. India has 172.
Space Missions. India has 124 missions. China has over 200.
Cricket World Cups. India leads with 2 World Cup wins. China has zero.
Internet Users. China leads with 1.05 billion. India has 900 million.
The final score. Five to four. China wins!
